questionHtml: Using information from Table 6, calculate the current account balance in 2019.
markschemeHtml:
16.3 - 12.9 - 2.65 = 0.75 [1]
Balance = (US)$ 0.75 billion OR (US)$ 750 million [1]

Any valid working should be rewarded with [1].

An answer of 0.75 or 750, without workings or without units, is sufficient for [1].

meta.title: Using information from Table 6, calculate the current account balance in 2019.
